title: Simulated: ComputerCraft Compat
description: This project introduces extra ComputerCraft features for Simulated mod.
body:
# Simulated: ComputerCraft Compat

[中文](README_ZH.md)

This mod is designed to add more ComputerCraft features for Simulated mod.

**If you have any ideas or feedback, please feel free to submit an issue or pull request.**

## Features

### Peripherals

- Rope Winch: Rope length & min length & max length getter
- Hot Air Burner: Hot air amount getter & setter
- Steam Vent: Steam amount getter & setter
- Wheel Mount: Suspension strength getter & setter

### Blocks

- Physics Data Accessor: Get the physics data of current sublevel

**You can disable registry-related features in config file.**
